HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT THOMAS VERNIERE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ROBERT A. IMHOFF HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: GISELLE S. MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Roland Lie, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Robert A. Imhoff, is present.
Attorney, Cindy Lee, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Thomas Verniere, is present.
Attorney, David M. Lilienstein, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of January 14, 2008 remains as set.
